data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the 'Opt-in/opt-out management' requirement, which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this functionality is implemented. The absence of any related evidence indicates a clear gap in coverage for this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of implementation for opt-in/opt-out management.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
